goal: Ed25519 (EdDSA/Curve25519): deterministic digital signature for QA cert attestation and agent identity anchoring.
pq_migration_path: Migrate to ML-DSA (FIPS 204) for post-quantum identity; use hybrid Ed25519+ML-DSA during transition period
failure_modes: Quantum adversary: Shor's algorithm breaks ECDLP — migrate to ML-DSA before Q-Day
Signing key exposure — use hardware security module (HSM) for key storage
Cofactor vulnerability on non-prime-order curves — Curve25519 is safe (cofactor=8, Montgomery ladder handles it)
composition_rules: Sign all QA cert family payloads; public key = agent identity anchor in cert ecosystem
Pair with X25519 for full TLS handshake (sign + key exchange)
Hybrid deployment: Ed25519 + ML-DSA dual-signature during quantum transition
